language:
<entry name="ChaosGuard/GiftOfContagionDescription" value=""/>
<entry name="ChaosGuard/WebwayRedoubtDescription" value="Allows you to found a city on captured Renegade Guard Fortress.
Cities can only be found where there are no other cities within a %1% tile radius. Each city after the first decreases loyalty in all cities by %2%."/>
<entry name="traitorguard/GiftOfContagionDescription" value=""/>
<entry name="traitorguard/WebwayRedoubtDescription" value="Allows you to found a city on captured Renegade Guard Fortress.
Cities can only be found where there are no other cities within a %1% tile radius. Each city after the first decreases loyalty in all cities by %2%."/>
